headline: Dover Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date, Conference Call and Webcast
summary: Dover (NYSE: DOV) announced today that it will release second quarter 2026 earnings at approximately 6:00 a.m. Central time (7:00 a.m. Eastern time) on Thursday, July 23, 2026. Later that morning, Dover will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Central time (9:30 a.m. Eastern time) to discuss these results.
